tvShow.name: The Undeclared War
tvShow.overview: In the post-pandemic world of 2024 during an upcoming British general election involving the UK’s first Black Conservative prime minister, a leading team of analysts at the heart of the UK’s NSA-style spy agency GCHQ attempt to ward off a cyber-attack on the country’s electoral system.

episodes.name: Episode 1
episodes.overview: A young intern's first day at GCHQ coincides with a major cyberattack on the UK. To win her superiors' trust, she breaks ranks to analyse the malware code without permission and uncovers a greater threat missed by others.

episodes.name: Episode 2
episodes.overview: Saara befriends John, a veteran GCHQ staffer, and seeks help from Gabriel in decrypting a message in the virus. Danny signs off on Saara attending a cyber conference with US agent Kathy, aware that Russian intelligence will also be there.

episodes.name: Episode 3
episodes.overview: Vadim returns to Russia where his allegiances are tested, leading him to a risky stunt.

episodes.name: Episode 4
episodes.overview: With Saara in a difficult position, a revelation forces her hand. Marina moves to London.

episodes.name: Episode 5
episodes.overview: Signs of irregularity in the UK general election result prompt political unrest, and the nation's relationship with its allies is threatened. Saara makes a devastating discovery.

episodes.name: Episode 6
episodes.overview: As the true extent of Russia's interference with the UK becomes clear, Saara and her former classmate join forces. Can they uncover the hidden code and prevent a war?

episodes.name: Episode 1
episodes.overview: As Danny deals with the fallout from the Russian cyber-attack, a bold new threat emerges.

episodes.name: Episode 2
episodes.overview: Vadim finds himself working for the Chinese. Danny and Roz clash, and the mole hunt is on.

episodes.name: Episode 3
episodes.overview: Barbara faces an impossible decision when her charming ex-boyfriend Nicky Chan re-appears.

episodes.name: Episode 4
episodes.overview: A malware attack on British government departments forces Danny and Roz to work together.

episodes.name: Episode 5
episodes.overview: Charlie interrogates Barbara, and Danny discovers a clue that turns his life upside down.

episodes.name: Episode 6
episodes.overview: Danny puts everything on the line in order to right some wrongs.

seasons.name: Season 2
seasons.overview: The elite Malware Department at GCHQ grapples with the aftermath of a devastating Russian cyber-attack. Just when it seems the UK has gained the upper hand, Danny and his team discover a mole in their midst and uncover a far more dangerous threat.

videos.name: The Undeclared War | Official Trailer | Peacock Original
